S.FORM: 50 Cent kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, 50 Cent, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga mlpuw mqwas na squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors hngzyang qwas na qyanux minqyanux nya semong qwas nya/mluhay minqwas nya == mhtuw lalu ==
S.PHON: ** ʦ~ʨent kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ** ʦ~ʨent, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa mlpuw mqwas~ɕ na s~ɕquliq. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ na qjanux minqjanux nja s~ɕemoŋ qwas~ɕ nja/mluħaj minqwas~ɕ nja == mħtuw lalu ==
S.FORM: 50 Cent kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, 50 Cent, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga mlpuw mqwas na squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors hngzyang qwas na qyanux minqyanux nya semong qwas nya/mluhay minqwas nya == mhtuw lalu ==
S.PHON: ** ʦ~ʨent kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ** ʦ~ʨent, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa mlpuw mqwas~ɕ na s~ɕquliq. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ na qjanux minqjanux nja s~ɕemoŋ qwas~ɕ nja/mluħaj minqwas~ɕ nja == mħtuw lalu ==
